title: Research Meshtastic app BLE/API protocol subset for MVP
description: Why this exists: the adapter must match what the current standard Meshtastic mobile app actually expects over BLE before code is written. What needs to be done: inspect Meshtastic app and firmware sources for BLE service/characteristics, ToRadio/FromRadio framing, protobuf messages, connection handshake, node info/status/config flows, and message send/receive behavior. Identify exact minimum message types for app discovery, pairing/connect, node info, status/config, text send, and incoming message/status display. Acceptance criteria: source references and commit SHAs are recorded in Beads notes; mandatory vs optional protobuf messages are listed; unsupported features for MVP are explicitly named; any uncertainty creates follow-up Beads.
notes:
2026-06-30 Meshtastic BLE/API protocol subset research completed from primary sources.

Upstream source SHAs inspected:
- meshtastic/protobufs master 032b7dfd68e875c4323e6ac67590c6fc616b1714.
- meshtastic/firmware HEAD 2f97112987af311ca81dd70b83cbcf7236d6c119; master 86fd2069715b38fc87dd49be3ff9a4dc7e99cc2d.
- meshtastic/python master 6d76edf8a7b192c51e3a5d26bc5868da556ac3d9.
- meshtastic/Meshtastic-Android main eb3bd10757a312d1537874bfab245117c46c36a9.
- meshtastic/Meshtastic-Apple main aeeb0cc49fbe0ed593e918ba2f95100ecf694256.

Core BLE surface confirmed from firmware src/BluetoothCommon.h at firmware 2f9711298: service UUID 6ba1b218-15a8-461f-9fa8-5dcae273eafd; ToRadio f75c76d2-129e-4dad-a1dd-7866124401e7; FromRadio 2c55e69e-4993-11ed-b878-0242ac120002; FromNum ed9da18c-a800-4f66-a670-aa7547e34453; LogRadio 5a3d6e49-06e6-4423-9944-e9de8cdf9547 exists but is diagnostic/optional for MVP; legacy LogRadio 6c6fd238-78fa-436b-aacf-15c5be1ef2e2 is optional. nRF52 BLE implementation uses FromNum notify32 to trigger app drain, FromRadio read-authorize to pull the next PhoneAPI frame, and ToRadio writes raw serialized ToRadio bytes into PhoneAPI. Android/iOS/Python all treat BLE as one protobuf per GATT value, not a stream with length prefix. Serial/TCP StreamAPI framing is separate and uses 0x94 0xc3 plus big-endian uint16 length before the protobuf payload. Firmware generated sizes show FromRadio_size 510 and ToRadio_size 504, with PhoneAPI compile-time guards against MAX_TO_FROM_RADIO_SIZE; BLE characteristic max length may be 512, but protobuf payload budget must be bounded to generated message sizes and ATT behavior still needs t2hn.18.

Protobuf contract from protobufs meshtastic/mesh.proto at 032b7dfd: FromRadio oneof includes packet=2, my_info=3, node_info=4, config=5, log_record=6, config_complete_id=7, rebooted=8, moduleConfig=9, channel=10, queueStatus=11, xmodemPacket=12, metadata=13, mqttClientProxyMessage=14, fileInfo=15, clientNotification=16, deviceuiConfig=17, lockdown_status=18, region_presets=19. ToRadio oneof includes packet=1, want_config_id=3, disconnect=4, xmodemPacket=5, mqttClientProxyMessage=6, heartbeat=7. MeshPacket fields needed for MVP: fixed32 from/to, decoded Data, id, rx_time, rx_snr, hop_limit, want_ack, priority, rx_rssi, via_mqtt, hop_start, transport_mechanism. MyNodeInfo carries my_node_num, reboot_count, min_app_version, device_id, pio_env, firmware_edition, nodedb_count. NodeInfo carries num, User, Position, snr, last_heard, device_metrics, channel, via_mqtt, hops_away, favorite/ignored/muted/key flags.

Current Android app behavior at eb3bd107: KableMeshtasticRadioProfile subscribes/observes FromNum, proactively triggers FromRadio drain, reads FromRadio until empty, and writes raw ToRadio bytes. MeshConnectionManager sends heartbeat before want_config_id and uses a two-stage handshake: CONFIG_NONCE 69420 for config/module/channel side and NODE_INFO_NONCE 69421 for node DB. FromRadioPacketHandlerImpl dispatches my_info, metadata, node_info, config_complete_id, mqtt proxy, queueStatus, config, moduleConfig, channel, fileInfo, region_presets, xmodem, lockdown_status, clientNotification, and rebooted (which retriggers want_config). PacketHandlerImpl uses queueStatus to complete send status by mesh_packet_id or first pending request. SharedRadioInterfaceService sends polite ToRadio(disconnect=true) before teardown. Android text send uses ToRadio.packet with MeshPacket.decoded.portnum TEXT_MESSAGE_APP, UTF-8 payload, wantAck true, broadcast destination max node number or direct destination node number; app-visible delivery ACK/NAK status uses ROUTING_APP packets where decoded.request_id ties to the original packet id and routing error_reason NONE means success.

Apple app behavior at aeeb0cc: BLEConnection uses the same service/ToRadio/FromRadio/FromNum/LogRadio UUIDs; readiness requires ToRadio, FromRadio, and FromNum; AccessoryManager sends wantConfigID using NONCE_ONLY_CONFIG and NONCE_ONLY_DB (same 69420/69421 staging), dispatches FromRadio.myInfo/packet/nodeInfo/regionPresets/configCompleteID and related variants, treats region_presets as part of the 2.8+ want_config handshake, and handles ROUTING_APP ACK/NAK similarly for message status. Apple and Android both need the same core raw-protobuf BLE and config/database sync surface for MVP smoke.

Python client behavior at 6d76edf8: BLE flow scans/connects by service UUID, optionally subscribes log, sends ToRadio.want_config_id, reads FromRadio repeatedly until config_complete_id matches, then subscribes FromNum and drains FromRadio until empty on notifications. Python waitForConfig requires local config/channels and node data; sendText wraps UTF-8 text in MeshPacket.decoded.payload with TEXT_MESSAGE_APP, assigns packet ID, destination/channel/want_ack/hop limit, and sends as ToRadio.packet. Firmware rate-limits TEXT_MESSAGE_APP from phone to about once per 2 seconds and can return queue status plus routing error on limit.

Mandatory MVP protocol elements for unmodified app discovery/sync/text: advertise Meshtastic service UUID; expose ToRadio write, FromRadio read, FromNum read/notify; accept raw ToRadio protobuf with heartbeat, want_config_id, disconnect, and packet; implement two-stage config handling for 69420 and 69421 while still echoing arbitrary client nonce in config_complete_id; return FromRadio.my_info, metadata (synthetic allowed), at least one channel, config sections needed by app screens, moduleConfig stubs or explicit benign defaults, region_presets or known-safe absence policy, node_info for local node/peers, and config_complete_id matching request; surface incoming/outgoing text as MeshPacket decoded TEXT_MESSAGE_APP; return queueStatus for send queue completion and ROUTING_APP ACK/NAK with decoded.request_id for message status; bound all decode/encode buffers to <= ToRadio_size/FromRadio_size budgets; reject BLE length-header framing.

Optional/deferred for MVP: LogRadio/log_record, xmodem/file transfer, MQTT client proxy, lockdown_status unless hardened build enabled, full admin/config writes, TAK/ATAK, store-and-forward, range test/traceroute UI fidelity, neighborinfo/map report, DeviceUIConfig beyond harmless defaults, position/telemetry/node status beyond baseline app display needs, exact Meshtastic RF routing semantics. Unsupported writes must return deterministic no-op/error behavior in project-LICHEN-t2hn.9 rather than silently pretending full Meshtastic firmware behavior.

Local repo state from subagent Einstein: docs/meshtastic-compat-dev.md has the right UUIDs but assumes 512-byte MTU and says native Zephyr is not supported, which conflicts with current Zephyr MVP Beads. Python adapter has queue/FromNum state but on_to_radio only logs and does not parse/dispatch ToRadio. Python translate/address tests cover text/position/nodeinfo and IID truncation. Rust lichen-meshtastic has UUID constants and bounded queue, but local proto subset lacks current ToRadio, FromRadio, MyNodeInfo, queueStatus, metadata, region_presets, moduleConfig. Rust GATT currently has length-header assumptions that conflict with BLE raw protobuf/FromNum drain semantics. Zephyr gateway currently exposes LICHEN-native NUS+SLIP, not Meshtastic GATT. Created project-LICHEN-t2hn.17 to reconcile target architecture before schema/transport implementation.

Follow-up Beads: project-LICHEN-t2hn.13 should update the compatibility contract for two-stage sync, heartbeat, queueStatus, ROUTING_APP ACKs, metadata, region_presets, moduleConfig, disconnect, and generated-size budgets. project-LICHEN-t2hn.14 should add raw BLE protobuf/FromNum drain vectors and reject serial/TCP length headers on BLE; it now depends on project-LICHEN-t2hn.18 and project-LICHEN-t2hn.19. project-LICHEN-t2hn.15 should define synthetic metadata/firmware-version policy. project-LICHEN-t2hn.16 should cover Android and iOS smoke scripts. project-LICHEN-t2hn.17 blocks schema/transport/test-harness implementation until the Zephyr C vs Rust/FFI vs host bridge path is selected. project-LICHEN-t2hn.18 covers BLE ATT/payload-size boundaries. project-LICHEN-t2hn.19 covers connect/heartbeat/want_config/text/ACK exchange vectors.
close_reason: Completed primary-source Meshtastic BLE/API subset research; recorded upstream SHAs, UUIDs, ToRadio/FromRadio fields, Android/Apple handshake behavior, mandatory/deferred MVP message set, local implementation gaps, and follow-up Beads.
